_comment: Safety policy for the agent OS approval gate. Categories map to a policy: gate (needs your approval), allow (runs free), deny (hard-blocked, no approval path). Any category not listed, and any action that matches no rule, defaults to allow. Rule PATTERNS live in the rulepacks (see enabledPacks); this file only sets policy. Edit freely.

outbound_comms.desc: messages, emails, or posts sent to other people

deploy.desc: shipping code or config to production
